subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Your letter hath been received, and from its sweet contents your heartfelt sincerity and devotion become apparent [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و از مضامین دلنشین انجذابات وجدانیه معلوم گردید
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God
